title: Hare's Moon
description: An add-on for Enhanced Celestials, adding a Moon that aids in exploration and speed for the night.
body:
During the Hare's Moon event, you will feel energized, being granted with speed for the night. During a Super Hare's Moon, you will be granted with jump height as well. Use this time to explore!

All credit for Enhanced Celestials goes to the original author CorgiTaco.

Credit as well to Draconic Archer for making many other add-ons for Enhanced Celestials!
